subject: [For Review] Oct CB Quarterly Management Meeting

content.answer:
Hi Ian, Jianghong,

Please find the attached deck for the upcoming Quarterly CB Management
Meeting on 13th Oct, Monday, for your review.

FP&A, CNCI and CNLS has data that is WIP (with yellow stickers), pending
refresh in the next iteration tomorrow.

Let me know for any questions.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*

Thanks!

Slide 14: @Cheng Derek <derek.cheng@shopee.com> on VN infra fee impact, I
spoke with Alfred. We should evaluate whether we reduce infra fee for CB,
but increase commission by %. One of VN SOB driver is for low ABS. Infra
fee hurts us quite badly for SOB too. Can you do a quick check in with
Alfred whether we can call it out in front of Terence and Chris during this
forum?

Slide 119: Please update according to our discussion offline.

Hi Jason

Could you ask Shi Xin and Jennifer from Monee team to add our study on
Stablecoin solution for CB payment? This section will be presented by them.

Regards
Jianghong

Hi Jianghong, sure, let me organise this.

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please see replies below in blue, let me know if this is okay. Have also
attached updated deck with corrected format.



Slide 4 and 6

   - Can check the alignment of the boxes
   - Fixed



Slide 14 (Now Slide 16 due to slight rearrangement of slides)

   - For VN, was this caused by infrastructure fee or by the tax issues?
   - The penetration delta here is mostly caused by the infrastructure fee.
   VN tax was implemented in Feb and have already been priced in by the
   sellers by March. From April to June, VNCB penetration has been mostly
   stable, until the step decline in July following the launch of infra fee.
   - We also cross checked this data with Reg CB FP&A findings, comparing
   15 days before and 15 days after the launch of the infra fee, which showed
   a similar decline in CB ADO penetration.



On Sun, Oct 12, 2025 at 10:48 AM Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>
wrote:


-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*

content.question:
Actually on VN, I was referring more to the buyer facing tax collection.
Something around buyers having to fill in their particulars. This happening
around June/July period this year?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Actually on VN, I was referring more to the buyer facing tax collection.
Something around buyers having to fill in their particulars. This happening
around June/July period this year?


   -

   The buyer eKYC in VN happened in July 25th and had no impact for
   majority of July; The impact from buyer eKYC was mainly in Aug, when we see
   CNCB ADO penetration % dropping by ~1.3 p.p. from 12.2 p.p. in July to 10.9
   p.p. (alreay recovering and back to 11.5 p.p. in Sep)


[image: image.png]
Best,
Derek
